Subject: Inquiry Regarding Picnic Reservation Availability

Dear Park Office Staff,

I am writing to inquire about the availability of picnic tables and facilities for an upcoming reservation period.

For this event, we are expecting approximately 50 attendees. Please let us know if these tables need to be booked well in advance or if there are any specific permit requirements we must adhere to.

Regarding privacy details for this correspondence, please note that I will not disclose the number of attendees in the email.

Thank you for your assistance with this matter. We look forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
